title: carex × paulii
intro: Carex × paulii, also known as Paul's sedge, is a hybrid plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex × paulii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, fever, and digestive problems.
